title: Backward Induction Decision Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the backward induction process in a sequential game, showing how optimal strategies are determined by working backwards from the final decision nodes to the initial move.
relationships: Process flows from final decision nodes backwards to initial node
Each decision node evaluates subsequent player's optimal choices
Optimal actions are selected based on maximizing payoff at each step
The complete strategy is built from the end of the game to the beginning
